collision energy: a normalized collision energy of 35% was used for the CID fragmentation.
fragmentation method: a normalized collision energy of 35% was used for the CID fragmentation.
instrument: Top speed data-dependent precursor selection was used on a Thermo Scientific Quadrupole-Ion Trap-Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer.
labeling: The peptide quantitation workflow presented here has been implemented and validated in our prior work.
